description: Maestro IDE core terminology mapping from maestro-flow technical concepts to user-facing labels. Used by Concept Translator (F-006) across all UI surfaces.

terms.definition: AI 开发工作流编排 CLI 工具，Maestro IDE 的后端引擎

mode_rules.simple: MUST NOT appear in any user-visible text
mode_rules.advanced: MAY appear in system info / about panel

terms.definition: 从分析到规划到执行到测试的命令序列，代表一个完整的开发工作流

mode_rules.advanced: MUST display as 'Workflow (chain)' with raw term in parentheses

terms.definition: maestro 中可调用的命令单元，工作流中的一个步骤

mode_rules.advanced: MUST display as 'Action (skill)' with raw term in parentheses

terms.definition: 将任务分派给外部 AI 工具（如 Claude Code）执行

mode_rules.simple: MUST NOT appear; system auto-triggers delegation transparently
mode_rules.advanced: MAY display as 'Delegate to AI' in workflow step details

terms.definition: 项目进度节点，工作流执行的目标单元

mode_rules.advanced: MUST display as 'Goal (milestone)' with raw term in parentheses

terms.definition: 里程碑内的执行阶段，如分析阶段、规划阶段、执行阶段

mode_rules.advanced: MUST display as 'Stage (phase)' with raw term in parentheses

terms.definition: 工作流步骤产生的文件输出，如代码文件、配置文件、测试报告

mode_rules.advanced: MUST display as 'Output (artifact)' with raw term in parentheses

terms.definition: 一次 maestro 命令执行的运行实例，代表一次 CLI 进程的生命周期

mode_rules.simple: MUST NOT appear in any user-visible text
mode_rules.advanced: MAY appear in terminal session management as 'Session'

terms.definition: 项目工作流的状态追踪系统，管理 WorkflowExecution 和 ApprovalGate 的状态转换

mode_rules.advanced: MAY display as 'State Machine' in technical debug views

terms.definition: Anthropic 的 CLI 编程助手，Maestro IDE 的唯一 AI 后端

mode_rules.advanced: MUST display as 'AI Assistant (Claude Code)' with raw term in parentheses

simple_mode.rule: All user-visible text MUST pass through translate(term, 'simple') before rendering. Hidden terms MUST NOT appear under any circumstance including error messages.
simple_mode.fallback: Untranslatable errors MUST be wrapped in generic container with 'Show details' progressive disclosure.

advanced_mode.rule: Translated terms display raw term in parentheses after the user-facing label. Hidden terms MAY appear in designated technical views.
advanced_mode.fallback: Same generic container as simple mode, but 'Show details' is expanded by default.

mode_switching.rule: Mode switch MUST use progressive disclosure -- add raw terms in parentheses, do not replace the translated label. Transition MUST complete within 200ms.
